query:
UPDATE claims
SET
  incident_description = 'The Insured''s vehicle (Isuzu D-Max AEX 6208) collided with the rear section of a Third-Party Vehicle (Mr Gwatsvaira) which then collided with another vehicle in front of it. The accident occurred on 09 November 2024. The vehicle was inspected at Dama Falls, Harare on 19 November 2024 by Native Loss Adjustors (Ashley Chapanduka). Three quotes were obtained; the lowest quote from Avana Motors was USD 4,736.28. The assessor negotiated an agreed repair cost of USD 2,576.00, achieving savings of USD 2,160.28. The assessor declared the claim authentic and damages consistent with accident circumstances.',
  normalised_description = 'Chain rear-end collision: insured vehicle struck third-party vehicle from behind; third-party vehicle then struck a second vehicle ahead. Accident date: 09 November 2024. Location: Harare, Zimbabwe. Agreed repair cost: USD 2,576.00 (3 quotes obtained; lowest: USD 4,736.28 from Avana Motors). Market value: USD 17,000. Repair-to-value ratio: 15.2%. Assessor verdict: authentic claim, damages consistent with reported circumstances.'
WHERE id = 2730001;
